title: EverythingPink
description: A clean, PvP-focused texture pack with pink and magenta accents, clear armor visibility, and high-contrast items designed for fast combat, SMP fights, and smooth, stylish gameplay.
body:
### ✨ Texture Pack Features

* 🎮 **PvP-focused design** made to feel clean, sharp, and satisfying in real fights
* 💗 **Pink / magenta themed gear** that gives enchanted armor and Netherite a bold, aggressive look
* ⚔️ **High-contrast weapons & tools** so swords, axes, and items are easy to read mid-combat
* 👀 **Clear armor visibility** — players stand out better in duels, SMP fights, and group battles
* 🧪 **Easy-to-spot items** like potions, Totems, and crystals for fast reaction gameplay
* 🌙 **Looks great day & night**, with colors that pop without being blinding
* 🧼 **Reduced visual clutter** to help you stay focused during intense PvP moments
* 🎥 **Content-creator friendly** — clean visuals that look good in screenshots and recordings
* 🧱 **Vanilla-styled base**, so it still feels like Minecraft and not a completely different game

Perfect for SMPs, crystal PvP, sword fights, or just flexing clean visuals while playing. Clean, stylish, and made for combat 🔥
